title: Add midpoint kill switch for congress sessions

log.message: Created from Congress #96 verdict on: How should Congress be improved?

Source verdict: Congress's biggest failure mode isn't structural — it's that too many debates end with synthesized mush because the debaters perform disagreement without actually disagreeing on anything load-bearing....
Added midpoint kill switch — chairman evaluates for actionable dispute, terminates early if none

log.context: Marked stale by watchdog — session likely ended before task completed
